name: Chicken Wing Drumsticks
recipeInstructions:
Marinate the chicken wings in a mixture of five-spice powder, MSG (optional), salt, sugar, rice wine, and soy sauce for 1 hour. Add the egg white and coat the wings evenly. This will help seal the juice inside the meat.
Dredge the wings in the cornstarch mixture to make the outside layer crisp.
Deep-fry the wings for 3 minutes until cooked through. Drain and let cool.
Before serving, deep-fry the wings again at a very hot temperature to make the outside crispy. Ensure the oil is extremely hot before frying.
Source: Stella Chan's Secrets in the Art of Chinese Cooking.
